patterns.explanation: Doji indicates market indecision. Equal buying and selling pressure. Watch for direction confirmation on next candle.
Bearish Engulfing shows strong selling momentum completely overwhelming prior buying. High probability reversal signal.
Bullish Engulfing shows strong buying momentum completely overwhelming prior selling. High probability reversal signal.
